## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:cli` passes
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build` passes
- [ ] If patterns/models/prompts changed: updated docs and (if relevant) `validation/`
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` committed
